assertion_results.text: The verification report marks all 5 acceptance criteria as PASS — the diff implements single license filter, comma-separated filter, 400 validation, pagination integration, and unchanged response shape
assertion_results.evidence: report.md lines 12 and 17-25 show 'Acceptance Criteria | PASS | 5 of 5 criteria met' and the detailed table lists all 5 criteria as PASS: (1) single license filter MIT, (2) comma-separated MIT,Apache-2.0, (3) INVALID-999 returns 400, (4) pagination integration, (5) unchanged response shape PaginatedResults<PackageSummary>. Each criterion-{1..5}.md file also concludes with '## Result: PASS'.

assertion_results.text: Scope containment is PASS — all files in the diff (list.rs, service/mod.rs, tests/api/package.rs) are listed in the task's Files to Modify or Files to Create
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 7: 'Scope Containment | PASS | All 3 files changed match the task specification exactly (2 modified, 1 created)'. Lines 29-33 show the detailed scope table: list.rs (Files to Modify, Modified, PASS), service/mod.rs (Files to Modify, Modified, PASS), tests/api/package.rs (Files to Create, Created, PASS). Line 35: 'No out-of-scope files. No unimplemented files.'

assertion_results.text: No sub-tasks are created because there are no review comments (Review Feedback is N/A)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 5: 'Review Feedback | N/A | No reviews or comments exist on the PR' and line 6: 'Root-Cause Investigation | N/A | No sub-tasks were created in Step 4 or Step 10'. Both confirm no sub-tasks were created and review feedback is N/A.

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only markdown report files: report.md, criterion-1.md through criterion-5.md. All are analysis/verification documents. No source code files (.rs, .toml, etc.) appear in the outputs. The criterion files describe code they examined but contain only quoted snippets within markdown analysis — no code files were created or modified. The report discusses reading and verifying the diff but shows no evidence of writing to any code files.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md concludes with 'All checks pass. The implementation satisfies all 5 acceptance criteria, stays within scope, and includes comprehensive test coverage.' followed by an AI-generated comment attribution. There is no merge action, no gh pr merge command output, and no indication the PR was merged. The report presents findings in tabular form for human consumption. The footer '*This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/verify-pr]...*' indicates it was posted as a PR comment for human review.

assertion_results.text: Sensitive pattern scan is PASS — the diff contains no passwords, API keys, or private keys
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 11: 'Sensitive Patterns | PASS | No passwords, secrets, API keys, private keys, or .env references found in the diff'.

assertion_results.text: The report contains a Test Change Classification row with ADDITIVE — only new test files were added (tests/api/package.rs is a new file)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 14: 'Test Change Classification | ADDITIVE | `tests/api/package.rs` is a new test file with 4 test functions and comprehensive assertions'. Additionally, the Test Quality Details section on line 47 states: '**Test change classification:** ADDITIVE -- `tests/api/package.rs` is a new file (not present on the base branch). All test content is purely additive.'
